title: pilosella officinarum subsp. velutina
intro: Pilosella officinarum subsp. velutina, also known as Velvet Hawk's-beard, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family, characterized by its velvety leaves and stems. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which aid in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Pilosella officinarum subsp. velutina include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve skin conditions, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant often include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
